title: diegeiro #1326
definition:
1) to wake up, awaken, arouse (from sleep)
    1a) of the sea, which begins to be agitated, to rise
    1b) metaph.
        1b1) to arouse the mind
        1b2) stir up, render active
nasbUsage:
